name: langsmith
trigger: failed runs (status=error) on monitored projects since last state
env_doc: LANGSMITH_API_KEY carries auth (NAME only here; value env-only, never written to any file).
query_cmd: curl -sf -X POST -H "x-api-key: $LANGSMITH_API_KEY" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"filter\": \"eq(status, 'error')\", \"limit\": 50}" https://api.smith.langchain.com/api/v1/runs/query | python3 rails/observers/extract.py langsmith
